name: Heterogeneity Wraith
value: heterogeneity core (forbidden alchemy ingredient); corrupted soul fragment
behaviorScript: Mindless Corruption — from BTT; cultivator whose Heterogeneity accumulation exceeded threshold, transforming into a mindless alien beast; either explodes into blood mist or becomes this; aggressive, no cognition
threat: High (unpredictable; retains fragments of original techniques)
cultivationValue: Heterogeneity Core is a forbidden-but-powerful catalyst for dark arts; Soul Fragments reveal corruption mechanics
alchemyUses: Forbidden Heterogeneity Elixir (power boost, corruption risk)
knownInheritances: None — Wraiths are failures, not inheritances
